animation.init: Graph structure visualization: Nodes and Edges.
animation.remove_vertex: Removing node: node-{{val}} and its connected edges
animation.add_edge: Selecting nodes {{src}} and {{dst}}, creating an edge
animation.remove_edge: Selecting nodes {{src}} and {{dst}}, removing the edge
animation.check_adjacent_false: Result: False (no edge exists from {{src}} to {{dst}})
animation.check_connected_init: Using BFS to check connectivity starting from node {{start}} (ignoring direction)
animation.check_connected_process_node: Processing node {{current}}, searching for unvisited neighbors
animation.check_connected_result_true: Result: The graph is connected! All nodes are reachable.
animation.check_connected_result_false: Result: The graph is disconnected. Orange nodes indicate isolated components.
animation.check_cycle_end_true: Check complete: Graph contains a cycle. Path: {{path}}
animation.check_cycle_end_false: Check complete: The graph is acyclic.

ui.requireTargetId: Please enter a destination (Dst) node ID

ui.getDegreeTooltip: Get the degree of the specified node
ui.addEdgeTooltip: Add an edge between two nodes
ui.removeEdgeTooltip: Remove the edge between two nodes
ui.checkAdjacentTooltip: Check whether two nodes are adjacent
